## Meeting Purpose

[Final project sync to review content status and confirm deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline:** 20 blogs are in progress, with 5 in review and 6 new pieces due EOW. A ticket is filed to stage the first batch of ready-to-publish blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [**Final Deliverables:** GrowthX will deliver all remaining SoW items by tomorrow, Nov 21, including site issue analysis and recommendations for Reddit, YouTube, and LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [**Feedback Plan:** Bubble will provide editorial feedback next week. GrowthX will implement edits, as Aida is available (except Tuesday) while Bubble is on holiday.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**Project Success:** Bubble confirmed the 8-week sprint successfully provided a critical foundation: a validated query strategy, defined content buckets, and clear tracking metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

## Topics

### Final Deliverables & Strategy

  - [GrowthX will deliver all remaining SoW items by tomorrow, Nov 21.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [**Package includes:**](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [Comprehensive site issue analysis from a geo specialist.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [Full download of all project artifacts (Content OS, Notion space).](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [High-level recommendations for Reddit, YouTube, and LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [**Social Media Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**LinkedIn:** Primary focus.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Instagram/TikTok:** Not a GrowthX specialty; recommendations will be high-level.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Key Insight:** AI app dev creators (e.g., "lovables") succeed by leveraging user-generated content (UGC) for social proof.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

### Content Pipeline & Feedback

  - [**Status:** 20 blogs are in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
      - [**Ready to Publish:** Ticket filed for staging in Ghost.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
      - [**In Review:** 5 blogs (2 refreshes, 3 new).](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [**In Progress:** 6 new blogs due EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [**Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [Bubble writer Annette will provide editorial feedback next week, splitting the task with Sara.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [**Clarification:** Green highlights in refreshes indicate new text, simplifying the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Aida is available next week (except Tuesday) to implement edits while Bubble is on holiday.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)

### Project Wrap-up & Appreciation

  - [Bubble confirmed the 8-week sprint provided a critical foundation for future work.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**Key Outcomes:**](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [Validated query strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [Defined content buckets.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [Clear tracking metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Bubble specifically thanked the GrowthX designer for work that helped the team visualize possibilities with AI models.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Deliver all remaining SoW items by Nov 21.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [**Bubble:** Provide editorial feedback on content next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**Aida (GrowthX):** Implement feedback next week (available except Tuesday).](https://fathom.video/share/Mi1Q-djk2KNWM9TKykTsEjTqAmAXuPn1?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
